zh.Freiston, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾福萊斯頓
zh.Hilton, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾希爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Hilton於1290年出生在英國越可爾斯文時，他的父親Robert de Hilton55歲，母親Joan Britton45歲。他於1316年與Margaret Greystoke在英國越可爾希爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1351年在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.Hilton, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾希爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Hilton于1290年出生在英国越可爾斯文时，他的父亲Robert de Hilton55岁，母亲Joan Britton45岁。他于1316年与Margaret Greystoke在英国越可爾希爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1351年在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hilton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Hilton (e.g. in Cambridgeshire, Derbyshire, Staffordshire, North Yorkshire, and Westmorland), most of which derive from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some come from Old English helde ‘slope’ + tūn.

occasionally, as in the case of Ralph filius Hilton (Yorkshire 1219), perhaps from the personal name Hilton, itself a possible form of Norman Hildun, composed of the ancient Germanic elements hild ‘strife, battle’ + hūn ‘bear cub’. Compare Hilt . This English surname is present in Ireland (mainly taken to Ulster in the early 17th century, though recorded earlier in Dublin).

variants.name: Hulton
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Hulton (Lancashire) or Hulton (Staffordshire), both from Old English hyll ‘hill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Hilton .

variants.name: Hilt
meanings: German: from a short form of Hildebrand or some other compound ancient Germanic name formed with hild ‘strife, battle’ as the first element. See Hild .
English (London): from the Middle English personal name Hilte, ultimately from ancient Germanic Helto, probably from halith- ‘hero’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Hilton was born in 1290, in Swine, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Hilton, was 55 and his mother, Joan Britton, was 45. He married Margaret Greystoke in 1316, in Hilton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1351, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Hilton est né en 1290, à Swine, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Hilton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Joan Britton, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Greystoke en 1316, à Hilton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1351, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Hilton 1290 in Swine, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Hilton 55 und seine Mutter Joan Britton 45. Er hat 1316 in Hilton, Yorkshire, England Margaret Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1351 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Hilton è nato il nel 1290 nel Swine, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Hilton, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Joan Britton, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Greystoke nel 1316, nel Hilton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1351, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Hilton(이)가 1290년 영국 요르크실르 스윈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Hilton(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Britton(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1316년 영국 요르크실르 힐턴에서 Margaret Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1351년 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Hilton nasceu em 1290, em Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Hilton, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Joan Britton, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Greystoke em 1316, em Hilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1351, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Hilton родился в 1290 г. в местности сваин, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Hilton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Britton, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Greystoke в 1316 г. в местности хилтон, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1351 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Hilton nació en 1290, en Swine, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Hilton, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Joan Britton, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margaret Greystoke en 1316, en Hilton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1351, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
